mandate: Rename Guests to Contacts, add vendor group types to GuestGroup, update filters/labels/forms in GuestsView and GuestListClient
keyFindings: Guests renamed to Contacts throughout the dashboard UI
6 vendor group types added: Photographer, Videographer, Florist, DJ/Band, Caterer, Planner
Filters and forms updated to support both guest and vendor contact types
whatWorked: Systematic find-and-replace with type safety. No backend migration needed since this was UI-only labeling.
whatFailed: Nothing failed. Testament was not written at sunset (retroactive).
recommendationsForNextAgent: The types/index.ts GuestGroup type now includes vendor categories. Any new contact types should be added there.
spiritContribution: Made the dashboard reflect the vendor coordination capability that already existed in the SMS pipeline.
